strings.lang.title: Language
strings.ov.title: Overview
strings.ov.conf.title: Confidence
strings.ov.types.title: Types
strings.ov.activity.title: Activity
strings.ov.recent.title: Recent memories
strings.ov.domains.title: Active domains
strings.mem.title: Memories
strings.mem.session.title: remove session filter
strings.bulk.clear.title: clear selection
strings.bulk.archive.title: Bulk archive
strings.bulk.archive.body: {n} memories will be archived (soft delete — reversible).
strings.bulk.reason.label: reason (optional)
strings.dr.close.title: close (Esc)
strings.dr.prevKept: the previous version stays in history
strings.dr.contentUpdated: content updated — previous version kept in history
strings.dr.archiveModal.title: Archive memory
strings.dr.archiveModal.body: Soft delete: content is kept, but the memory leaves default search and listings.
strings.dr.archiveModal.label: reason (kept in history)
strings.dr.rel.out.title: from this memory to the other
strings.dr.rel.in.title: from the other memory to this one
strings.dr.rel.remove.title: remove relation
strings.dr.rel.removeModal.title: Remove relation
strings.dr.rel.removeModal.body: The link between the two memories will be undone (both memories remain).
strings.dr.rel.target.placeholder: link to… (search or paste a uid)
strings.dr.rel.pickBoth: pick the target and the relation type
strings.dz.hint: Deletes the memory, its history and its relations. Irreversible — prefer archiving. To confirm, type DELETE {uid}:
strings.mm.title: Edit metadata
strings.mm.tags.label: tags (comma-separated — feed search and the embedding)
strings.mm.hint: changing domain or tags recomputes the memory's vector; everything is audited in history
strings.g.title: Relations graph
strings.g.sub: {n} memories · {m} links — drag nodes; scroll to zoom; click to inspect
strings.g.banner.source: link mode: click the SOURCE memory
strings.g.modal.title: Create relation
strings.do.title: Domains
strings.do.collide.title: variants of the same name: {list} — click to merge
strings.do.rn.placeholder: new name (or an existing one, to merge)
strings.do.rn.warn: the target already exists — memories will be merged into it
strings.do.rn.hint: every affected memory is re-embedded (domain is part of the embedding) and audited in history
strings.do.case.title: Domain casing
strings.do.case.desc: How domain names are stored. Applies to every new write; 'lower'/'upper' adjust non-conforming domains and report it. Use Normalize to bring existing domains in line.
strings.do.case.preserveHint: Policy is Preserve — nothing to normalize.
strings.do.case.none: All domains already match the policy.
strings.do.norm.title: Normalize domains
strings.do.norm.mergeWarn: Merges combine variant spellings into one domain — affected memories are re-embedded and audited.
strings.mn.title: Maintenance
strings.mn.sub: database health, deduplication, index rebuilds and audit trail
strings.mn.backups.empty: no backups yet — make the first one
strings.mn.h.vecUnavailable: sqlite-vec extension unavailable in this process
strings.mn.confirm.reembedAll: Recompute ALL vectors in the store? It can take a few seconds.
strings.mn.confirm.title: Confirm operation
strings.mn.dd.title: Duplicate scan
strings.mn.dd.aside: lexical overlap — the verdict is yours
strings.mn.dd.hint: run the scan to list similar pairs
strings.mn.au.title: Audit
strings.mn.au.empty: no audit events yet — edits, archives and curation appear here
strings.op.title: Optimization
strings.op.sub: review AI-staged curation suggestions — apply, reject or undo each
strings.op.searchRuns: search runs — id, note or kind
strings.op.group.applyConfirm.title: Apply group
strings.op.group.applyConfirm.body: Apply the {n} pending “{kind}” suggestion(s) in run #{id}? A full database backup is taken first, and each change can still be undone individually.
strings.op.backupNote: safety backup taken before first apply: {name}
strings.op.emptyRuns: no optimization runs yet — from a Claude session say “optimize my memories” and the agent will stage a batch of suggestions here for review
strings.op.allApplied: all suggestions in this run are applied — turn off “hide applied” to see them
strings.op.relType.title: relation type
strings.op.applyAllConfirm.title: Apply all pending
strings.op.applyAllConfirm.body: Apply all {n} pending suggestion(s) in run #{id}? A full database backup is taken first, and each change can still be undone individually.
strings.op.discardConfirm.title: Discard run
strings.op.discardConfirm.body: Delete run #{id} and all its suggestions? Already-applied changes to memories are NOT reverted — this only clears the suggestion list.
strings.nm.title: New memory
strings.nm.tags: tags (commas — feed search and the embedding)
